3. Fill in this template.
-->

## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences. What does this PR do? -->

## Active phase

<!-- Which phase is this PR part of? Link the phase spec file. -->

- Phase #:
- Spec file: [docs/planning/phases/phase-XX-*.md](../blob/main/docs/planning/phases/)

## Deliverable(s) closed

- [ ] Deliverable 1
- [ ] Deliverable 2

## Type of change

- [ ] `feat:` new feature
- [ ] `fix:` bug fix
- [ ] `chore(phase-N):` phase scaffolding / worklog
- [ ] `docs:` documentation only
- [ ] `test:` tests only
- [ ] `refactor:` non-behaviour change
- [ ] `ci:` CI configuration

## Checklist

- [ ] `uv run ruff check src tests` passes locally.
- [ ] `uv run pyright src` passes locally.
- [ ] `uv run pytest -q` passes locally; new tests added for new behaviour.
- [ ] `uv run mkdocs build --strict` passes locally.
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` `Unreleased` section updated.
- [ ] Phase spec file's worklog has a new entry if a deliverable was closed.
- [ ] Docs updated where user-facing.
- [ ] No secrets committed. No PHI in plaintext.
